name: pixverse-v4.5
description: Quickly make 5s or 8s videos at 540p, 720p or 1080p. It has enhanced motion, prompt coherence and handles complex actions well.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds. 8 second videos cost twice as much as 5 second videos. (1080p does not support 8 second duration)
duration.title: duration

effect.description: Special effect to apply to the video. Does not work with last_frame_image.
effect.title: effect

image.description: Image to use for the first frame of the video
image.title: Image

last_frame_image.description: Use to generate a video that transitions from the first image to the last image. Must be used with image.
last_frame_image.title: Last Frame Image

motion_mode.description: Motion mode for the video. Smooth videos generate more frames, so they cost twice as much. (smooth is only available when using a 5 second duration, 1080p does not support smooth motion)
motion_mode.title: motion_mode

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to avoid certain elements in the video
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

quality.description: Resolution of the video. 360p and 540p cost the same, but 720p and 1080p cost more. See the README for details.
quality.title: quality

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation
seed.title: Seed

sound_effect_content.description: Sound effect prompt. If not given, a random sound effect will be generated.
sound_effect_content.title: Sound Effect Content

sound_effect_switch.description: Enable background music or sound effects
sound_effect_switch.title: Sound Effect Switch
